title: Pretband Help Ons Bloaz'n (Brummen) | Party Brass Band

hero.tagline: THE BEST INVENTION SINCE SLICED BREAD!

about.description: Pretband is a pleasantly-insane group of musicians from Brummen, a beautiful village between Amsterdam and Berlin. We survive every stage, terrace or festival ground.
about.feat_1_desc: From street festivals to events, anywhere and everywhere!
about.feat_2_desc: Our team of vibe makers is ready to bring the house down!

highlights.title: CHECK THE CHAOS
highlights.description: Relive our most legendary performances. From street festivals to events, we bring the fun everywhere!

agenda.badge: Check where we're tearing things down!

contact.description: Do you have any questions or want to book us? Feel free to send a message! Our team of vibe makers is ready for you.
